data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Instagram's backend system is designed to handle millions of users simultaneously, leveraging cloud solutions and microservices.
data.technical_spec: Microservices architecture, AWS cloud hosting, Kubernetes orchestration.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Utilizes redundant systems to ensure uptime and reliability, crucial for a global social media platform.
data.technical_spec: Load balancers, auto-scaling groups, and distributed databases.

data.title: Data Storage Optimization
data.description: Efficient use and management of databases optimized for social media features, such as likes and comments.
data.technical_spec: Cassandra, MySQL, and NoSQL databases for user data and analytics.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Employs CDNs to quickly deliver media content to users all over the world.
data.technical_spec: Akamai, Cloudflare for efficient content distribution.

data.title: APIs and Integration
data.description: Robust API systems allow integration with other platforms and enhance features through third-party applications.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs, GraphQL for client-server communication.
